Life Update 🐕
I decided to move to Chicago this year. It wasn’t easy of a decision but certain it was the right one for me at this time.

To all of my dance/queer/kink family in Pittsburgh, I may not be around as much as I used too, but I will be making efforts to stop by and share the same space with you again. Thank you for being so welcoming to this stray. 

Feeling optimistic about the future of my time in Chicago. I have a list of projects I’m looking forward to get myself heavily invested in revolving around content creation and music production. I’m looking forward to be sharing what I come up with this year. Also, keep a lookout for dates for upcoming parties I’ll be DJing. I’ll have dates posted soon.

Thank you all with your continuous support with everything. It means a lot.

With Love,
Zander 🐾
